fields.label: Page Sections
fields.name: flexible_landing_page_sections
fields.instructions: Add, remove, and reorder sections to build the page.

sub_fields.label: Headline (H1)
sub_fields.name: flp_hero_headline
sub_fields.default_value: A Modern Approach to Mental Health

sub_fields.label: Subheadline (H2)
sub_fields.name: flp_hero_subheadline
sub_fields.instructions: Optional tagline shown below the main headline

sub_fields.label: Body Text
sub_fields.name: flp_hero_body
sub_fields.instructions: Optional paragraph shown below the headline
sub_fields.default_value: Your journey is unique, and your treatment should be, too. At Pacific Mind Health, we combine science with compassion to offer traditional and innovative evidence-based care. Whether you are seeking relief from treatment-resistant symptoms or managing complex conditions, our team is here to guide you.

sub_fields.label: Section Title
sub_fields.name: flp_intro_title
sub_fields.default_value: Care That Works as Hard as You Do

sub_fields.label: Body Text
sub_fields.name: flp_intro_body
sub_fields.default_value:
Pacific Mind Health provides outpatient mental health care for patients and their families across California. Our goal is to help you access the support you need as quickly as possible, with care that fits your life, your schedule, and your needs.

Take the next step. Call 310-571-5041 or email contact@pacificmindhealth.com.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_insurance_intro
sub_fields.default_value: We are in-network with most major insurance providers. Your benefits may cover the full cost of care — including copays, deductibles, and coinsurance — so you can access treatment with zero out-of-pocket costs.

sub_fields.label: "Coming Soon" Note
sub_fields.name: flp_insurance_coming_soon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional note shown below the logos. Example: Kaiser Permanente — Coming Soon!

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_why_intro
sub_fields.default_value: We combine science with compassion to offer traditional and innovative evidence-based care tailored to every patient.

sub_fields.label: Icon Image
sub_fields.name: flp_why_card_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional icon shown above the card title

sub_fields.label: Card Body
sub_fields.name: flp_why_card_body
sub_fields.default_value: Describe this feature or benefit in one to two sentences.

sub_fields.label: Coverage Note
sub_fields.name: flp_why_coverage_note
sub_fields.instructions: Optional note shown below the cards with a shield icon
sub_fields.default_value: Your insurance benefits may cover the full cost of care — including copays, deductibles, and coinsurance. No out-of-pocket costs.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_conditions_intro
sub_fields.default_value: Beyond standard depression, we offer treatments for a wide range of conditions, available in-person and online across all of California.

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: flp_conditions_tag_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional — leave blank to render as plain text

sub_fields.label: Online Availability Text
sub_fields.name: flp_conditions_online_text
sub_fields.instructions: Example: Online: Available anywhere in California

sub_fields.label: Side Image
sub_fields.name: flp_conditions_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional — when provided, section switches to a two-column layout

sub_fields.label: Section Title
sub_fields.name: flp_challenges_title
sub_fields.default_value: Unique Mental Health Challenges We Help With

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_challenges_intro
sub_fields.default_value: You don't have to face these challenges alone. Our team is here to help you through every step of your journey.

sub_fields.label: Card Body
sub_fields.name: flp_chall_body
sub_fields.default_value: Describe this challenge and how it impacts mental health and daily life.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Note Text
sub_fields.name: flp_challenges_note
sub_fields.default_value: Mental health challenges are not a sign of weakness, but stigma can still make it hard to seek help. Reaching out is a proactive step toward improving your quality of life, maintaining your ability to work, and providing for your family.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text
sub_fields.name: flp_treatments_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small label above the heading. Example: What We Offer

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_treatments_intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional paragraph shown below the heading
sub_fields.default_value: We provide a full spectrum of mental health services, from specialized treatments to traditional talk therapy.

sub_fields.label: Card Description
sub_fields.name: flp_treat_desc
sub_fields.default_value: Describe this treatment, what it involves, and how it helps patients achieve better mental health outcomes.

sub_fields.label: Sub-List
sub_fields.name: flp_treat_sub_list
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bulleted list shown below the description (useful for treatment options like TMS variants)

sub_fields.label: Reviews Shortcode
sub_fields.name: flp_testimonials_shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the shortcode for your reviews widget

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: flp_locations_intro
sub_fields.default_value: Care close to where you live and work, in person at one of our California clinics, or online from anywhere in the state.

sub_fields.label: Google Maps Embed URL
sub_fields.name: flp_loc_map_url
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the Google Maps embed URL (from the Share > Embed a map dialog)

sub_fields.label: Address
sub_fields.name: flp_loc_address
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for Street / Suite / City, State ZIP
sub_fields.default_value:
Street Address
Suite #
City, CA ZIP

sub_fields.label: Headline
sub_fields.name: flp_cta_headline
sub_fields.default_value: Take the Next Step Toward Better Mental Health

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: flp_cta_subtext
sub_fields.default_value: Join the thousands of Californians who have found relief through our technology-forward, compassionate approach to mental health care.

sub_fields.label: Select Module
sub_fields.name: flp_global_module_select
sub_fields.instructions: Choose which global module to display here. Content is managed under Global Modules in the admin menu.
